Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class UserEngagementSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.UserEngagementSettings2
public class UserEngagementSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for UserEngagementSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="UserEngagementSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CanGovCloudUseAdoptionApps" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DoesScheduledSwitcherRunDaily" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAutoTransitionDelayed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCrucNotificationDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCustomHelpGlobalSectionEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCustomProfileAutoTransitionDelayed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHelpMenuShowFeedbackEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHelpMenuShowHelpEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHelpMenuShowNewUserEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHelpMenuShowSearchEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHelpMenuShowSfdcContentEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHelpMenuShowShortcutEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHelpMenuShowSupportEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHelpMenuShowTrailheadEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIbilOptOutDashboardsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIbilOptOutEventsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIbilOptOutReportsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIbilOptOutTasksEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLexToClassicFeedbackEnableEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLexWelcomeMatDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsMeetTheAssistantDisabledInClassic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsMeetTheAssistantDisabledInLightning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOrchestrationInSandboxEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOrgUserAssistEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsScheduledSwitcherEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSfdcProductFeedbackSurveyEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsShowSalesforceUserAssistEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSmartNudgesDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}UserEngagementSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptimizerAppEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
